Daily Journal Prompts | Weeks 1 - 6 | ENG 101

Concrete, Abstract, Connecting, Exploratory


Daily Journal Prompts | Weeks 1 - 6 | ENG 101

Week 1: An Introduction to Writing

Day 1: Finding Your Voice in Writing
📌 Instructions: Choose one of the prompts below to explore in depth.

🔹 Concrete Prompt:

Describe a moment in your life when clear communication made a significant difference. What was the situation, and how did effective communication impact the outcome?

🔹 Abstract Prompt:

What does “voice” mean to you beyond just speaking? How do you think your personal voice influences how others perceive you?

🔹 Connecting Prompt:

Consider how your written voice differs from your spoken voice. In what ways do you think writing allows you to communicate differently or more effectively than speaking?

🔹 Exploratory Prompt:

If you could improve one aspect of your writing immediately, what would it be and why?
